title: Olde Newtype Announcement
wikitext:
[]: Olde Newtype Announcement             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sat Nov 07, 2009 12:28 am Don't know if this has been posted before (or if it's really thread-worthy), but I thought this Newtype announcement from circa episode 19 has some interesting things to say about the characters. http://home.comcast.net/~rocksunner/stray.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 07, 2009 12:30 am Luc showed me this find earlier and it's awesome. There's also Newtype Japan articles from around Death and Rebirth being out in theaters, but sadly I didn't see anything on post-EoE articles (There might have been and I just failed to notice). http://home.comcast.net/~rocksunner/rebirth.html
